_comment: Human-confirmed FFC name -> gsis_id matches (phase1-data-platform-design.md §3: name matches are proposals only; this file is where a proposal becomes a confirmed match after a human actually looks at it). NEVER add an entry here programmatically -- only after a human reviews capture/pull_crosswalk.py's ffc_unmatched_queue output and confirms which player is meant. Each gsis_id is checked against the live crosswalk at build time (capture/pull_crosswalk.py) and the whole entry is skipped with a loud warning if it no longer resolves, rather than silently trusting a stale value.

confirmed.reason: ambiguous collision with a 2026 rookie LB (Cleveland, gsis_id JEF270909) sharing the same normalized name -- confirmed WR (Minnesota)
ambiguous collision with a CB (Carolina, gsis_id 00-0036152) sharing the same normalized name -- confirmed QB (Baltimore)
ambiguous collision with a CB free agent (gsis_id 00-0026907) sharing the same normalized name -- confirmed WR (Buffalo, crosswalk lists him as 'D.J. Moore')
ambiguous collision with an RB free agent (gsis_id 00-0036188) sharing the same normalized name -- confirmed WR (Washington)
nickname for Kenneth Gainwell -- the crosswalk uses his formal first name, FFC/ESPN use his common nickname
nickname for Chigoziem Okonkwo -- the crosswalk uses his formal first name, FFC/ESPN use his common nickname
